200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Tank

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

The physical and magic armor of the Crusader and all allies in a small radius around him increases by 10% of the Crusader’s max health.

description 4/6

The physical and magic armor of the Crusader and all allies in a small radius around him increases by 20% of the Crusader’s max health. Once in a while, the Crusader’s max health is increased by 33% for 6 sec.

description 6/6

The physical and magic armor of the Crusader and all allies in a small radius around him increases by 30% of the Crusader’s max health. Once in a while, the Crusader’s max health is increased by 50% for 6 sec. Once in a while, the Crusader casts a shield on himself and on 2 allies with the lowest current health. The shield absorbs damage equal to 75% of the Crusader’s max health and lasts for 8 sec. A unit can only have one shield. The shield cannot be removed.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

All enemy figthers in a small radius around the Crusader take physical damage equal to 10% of the Crusader’s maximum health every second.

description 4/6

All enemy figthers in a small radius around the Crusader take physical damage equal to 10% of the Crusader’s maximum health every second. Whenever the Crusader gets an effect that restricts their movement, all enemy fighters in a small radius around the Crusader take physical damage equal to 20% of the Crusader’s maximum health.

description 6/6

All enemy figthers in a small radius around the Crusader take physical damage equal to 10% of the Crusader’s maximum health every second. Whenever the Crusader gets an effect that restricts their movement, all enemy fighters in a small radius around the Crusader take physical damage equal to 20% of the Crusader’s maximum health. When the Crusader applies a shield from the set’s abilities, damage from burning, acid, poison and attacks of 3 random allied fighters (archers priority) begins to ignore 40% of the targets’ armor for 8 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The Crusader’s physical and magic armor is increased by 20% of the maximum health of all allied fighters in a small radius around the Crusader.

description 4/6

The Crusader’s physical and magic armor is increased by 20% of the maximum health of all allied fighters in a small radius around the Crusader. The Crusader cannot receive a critical hit.

description 6/6

The Crusader’s physical and magic armor is increased by 20% of the maximum health of all allied fighters in a small radius around the Crusader. The Crusader cannot receive a critical hit. When the Crusader applies a shield from the set’s abilities, it applies additional shields to 3 random allied fighters. The shield blocks 350000 damage of any type. The shield lasts for 5 sec. Also it can be removed.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Increasing the physical and magic armor of allied fighters affects a large radius around the Crusader.

description 4/6

Increasing the physical and magic armor of allied fighters affects a large radius around the Crusader. Every 3 seconds the Crusader removes a random negative effect from themselves.

description 6/6

Increasing the physical and magic armor of allied fighters affects a large radius around the Crusader. Every 3 seconds the Crusader removes a random negative effect from themselves. When the Crusader receives a negative effect, with 25% chance the Crusader sets the enemy fighter who caused the effect on fire with holy fire. The burning enemy fighter takes 250000 magic damage and their healing is reduced by 50% for 5 sec. The Crusader also gets all the healing that the burning enemy fighter missed.

Shell

Dark Cathedral
